title: IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer, Project Assistant Posts
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna)
short_info: The Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) has officially announced the Project Engineer, Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was released under Advertisement No. R&D/1474/TCN/580 on the official IIT Patna website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 65 years (with applicable relaxations as per Government of India norms) and hold a B.Tech degree in Civil, Construction, Electrical, or Mechanical Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks or a CPI of 6.5 are eligible to apply through email mode. The application process is active and will

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit is 65 years, with relaxations as per Government of India norms.
age_limit.details: Project Engineer (Civil/Structural Engineer): Maximum age limit is 65 years. Project Engineer (Electrical/Mechanical Engineer): Maximum age limit is 65 years. Project Assistant (Civil Engineer): Maximum age limit is 65 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST, OBC, Women, and Persons with Disabilities (PwD) will be as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech degree in Civil, Construction, Electrical or Mechanical Engineering with minimum 60% marks or CPI of 6.5.
qualification.details: Project Engineer (Civil/Structural Engineer): B.Tech degree in Civil or Construction Engineering with minimum 60% marks or CPI of 6.5. Minimum 15 years' experience of civil works including structural works, RC and steel structure construction, and pavement works. Project Engineer (Electrical/Mechanical Engineer): B.Tech degree in Mechanical or Electrical Engineering with minimum 60% marks or CPI of 6.5. 15 years' experience of Electrical Mechanical works. Project Assistant (Civil Engineer): B.Tech degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 60% marks or CPI of 6.5.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna Project Engineer/Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 04-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a B.Tech degree in Civil, Construction, Electrical, or Mechanical Engineering with at least 60% marks or a CPI of 6.5.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Project Engineer and Project Assistant at IIT Patna?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies. One each for Project Engineer (Civil/Structural), Project Engineer (Electrical/Mechanical), and Project Assistant (Civil).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the Project Engineer and Project Assistant positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated fellowship/salary ranges from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 1,45,000 per month, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 65 years. Age relaxations are applicable as per Government of India norms for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q6. How should candidates apply for the IIT Patna recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email to Dr. Koushik Roy at [email protected], with the subject line "Position for Project No. 1474".

faq.question: Q7. What documents need to be attached with the application email?
faq.answer: You need to attach a scanned PDF copy of the duly filled application form, resume, and self-attested scanned PDFs of all supporting documents like degree certificates, mark sheets, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for these positions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Engineer/Assistant roles?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an ONLINE INTERVIEW for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form details are typically available on the IIT Patna website, and a direct link to the PDF will be provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
